title: cyrtandra clarkei
intro: Cyrtandra clarkei, also known as the Clarke's Cyrtandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a type of evergreen shrub native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Cyrtandra clarkei include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions.
